name: groupBy-non-vec-throws
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :GroupBySubjectNotVec :message "groupBy requires Vec subject, got Number" :operand "groupBy" :position "subject" :expectedType "Vec" :actualType "Number" :actualValue 42 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "groupBy" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["k"] :effectful false :text "/k" :location { :start { :offset 13 :line 1 :column 14 } :end { :offset 15 :line 1 :column 16 } } }] :effectful false :text "groupBy(/k)" :location { :start { :offset 5 :line 1 :column 6 } :end { :offset 16 :line 1 :column 17 } } } :input 42 } :trail [] }

name: groupBy-non-keyword-key-throws
expect: !{ :origin :qlang/eval :kind :type-error :thrown :GroupByKeyNotKeyword :message "groupBy: key sub-pipeline must produce a keyword for every element, element 0 produced Number" :index 0 :actualType "Number" :actualValue 1 :fault { :step { :qlang/kind :OperandCall :name "groupBy" :args [{ :qlang/kind :Projection :keys ["k"] :effectful false :text "/k" :location { :start { :offset 26 :line 1 :column 27 } :end { :offset 28 :line 1 :column 29 } } }] :effectful false :text "groupBy(/k)" :location { :start { :offset 18 :line 1 :column 19 } :end { :offset 29 :line 1 :column 30 } } } :input [{:k 1} {:k 2}] } :trail [] }

name: groupBy-roundtrip-via-vals-flat
query: let(:xs, [{:k :a} {:k :b} {:k :a}]) | xs | groupBy(/k) | vals | flat | count | eq(xs | count)
